procedure.name: UpdateInheritPortalObjectPermissions

index.name: IX_PortalObjectPermission_PermissionId_PortalObject
index.text: CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX [IX_PortalObjectPermission_PermissionId_PortalObject] ON [PortalObjectPermission] ( [PermissionId] ASC , PortalObject ASC ) include(UserSecuritySetCacheId, Id) WITH (PAD_INDEX = OFF, STATISTICS_NORECOMPUTE = OFF, SORT_IN_TEMPDB = OFF, IGNORE_DUP_KEY = OFF, DROP_EXISTING = OFF, ONLINE = OFF, ALLOW_ROW_LOCKS = ON, ALLOW_PAGE_LOCKS = ON) ON [PRIMARY]
